meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding to End Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Learn to build high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code in this intermediate project guide.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start architecting. By building a custom user onboarding flow, you bridge the gap between theory and product-market fit. Using Antigravity for state management and Claude Code for rapid implementation, you will transform passive learning into a tangible, deployable portfolio asset.
content.intro:
You have spent countless hours hovering over boilerplate code, yet your portfolio remains a graveyard of half-finished clones. The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and the imposter syndrome settles in—this is the suffocating grip of tutorial hell. You are not lacking intelligence; you are lacking a system that forces you to confront real-world user friction.

User onboarding is the ultimate technical proving ground. It forces you to handle state, database persistence, and user psychology simultaneously. By shifting your focus from 'learning syntax' to 'engineering user success,' you stop being a student and start becoming a product architect. It is time to stop watching and start building.

steps.title: Define User Milestones
steps.description: Identify the three 'aha' moments in your app. We need to map these to a state machine that tracks progress.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current database schema and generate a JSON-based state machine for a 3-step onboarding flow that tracks user progress in the 'onboarding_status' column.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a migration to add onboarding_status column to users table'

steps.title: Build the Progress Tracker
steps.description: Create a reusable UI component that renders the onboarding state without reloading the page.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, responsive React progress bar component that consumes a state object and animates between steps.

steps.title: Implement Conditional Navigation
steps.description: Restrict access to core features until the onboarding journey is complete to enforce user retention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a middleware function that checks the 'onboarding_status' and redirects users to the appropriate step if incomplete.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply middleware to protect /dashboard routes based on onboarding_status'

steps.title: Integrate Persistence Layer
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding state persists across sessions so users can pick up exactly where they left off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate an API endpoint that updates the user's 'onboarding_status' and returns the next suggested action.

steps.title: Final QA and Edge Case Testing
steps.description: Test the flow by simulating a user who drops off halfway through to ensure data integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the onboarding logic covering successful completion and mid-flow abandonment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'run onboarding logic unit tests'

pro_tips: Never build onboarding for features that haven't been validated; focus only on the 'Happy Path' first.
Use optimistic UI updates when saving progress to make the app feel instantaneous to the user.
Always include a 'Skip' button; forcing a user through onboarding often increases churn rates.
Track onboarding drop-off points as events in your analytics to see exactly where users get confused.
Treat your onboarding flow as a separate micro-service or module to keep your core codebase clean.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, share the link with three peers, and collect feedback on the friction points they encounter.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the architecture to turn any idea into a production-grade application. Stop waiting for permission to be an engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
